name: Aha! Product Roadmap & Strategy API
what_it_does: Aha! REST API for product roadmap and strategy platform. Enables AI agents to manage product goals and strategy alignment workflows, handle feature and epic creation and prioritization, access release planning and roadmap management data, retrieve idea management and customer feedback voting data, manage initiative and capacity planning, handle integration with Jira, GitHub, and Azure DevOps for engineering sync, access customer feedback portal and idea voting data, retrieve product analytics and prioritization scores, manage team and workspace configuration, and integrate product roadmap data with CRM and project management systems.
use_cases: Managing product roadmap and feature prioritization from product management agents
Accessing customer idea and feedback data from product intelligence agents
Syncing roadmap decisions to engineering tools from DevOps integration agents
Retrieving release planning and capacity data from product operations agents
not_for: Engineering task management without strategic roadmap planning context
Small teams using simple kanban without portfolio and strategy management
Real-time project execution without product strategy and roadmap focus
best_when: A product management team using Aha! wants AI agents to automate roadmap updates, feature prioritization, customer idea analysis, engineering tool sync, and product analytics.
avoid_when: CONFIDENTIAL: Product roadmap and strategy data is highly sensitive competitive intelligence. Automated feature prioritization must not bypass human product judgment. Customer feedback data contains PII. Integration with engineering tools (Jira/GitHub) can create records in both systems requiring careful conflict resolution.

auth.notes: Aha! uses API keys for REST API access. Account-level credentials for product and workspace data. Comprehensive API documentation at aha.io/api. Webhooks for feature, release, and idea events. Strong integrations with Jira, GitHub, Salesforce, and Zendesk.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 30-day free trial; no permanent free tier
pricing.notes: Menlo Park, California. Founded 2013. Bootstrapped and profitable. Product roadmap market leader. 700,000+ users, 10,000+ customers. Self-funded and 100% remote. Includes Aha! Roadmaps, Aha! Ideas, Aha! Create, Aha! Notebooks. Competes with Productboard and monday.com for product management.

performance.rate_limits: 50 API requests per minute per user

known_agent_gotchas: CONFIDENTIAL: Product roadmap and strategy data is sensitive competitive intelligence — restrict API key access
Rate limit of 50 req/min — automated roadmap syncing at high frequency will hit limits quickly
No public MCP server — API key REST API with no OAuth or fine-grained scopes
API key has all-or-nothing access — no scope limitation for read-only vs read-write
Engineering tool sync (Jira/GitHub) creates bidirectional dependencies — automated sync can create duplicate records
Idea voting data contains customer PII — GDPR deletion requests require cascading to Aha! ideas
agent_readiness.security_notes: Product roadmap and strategy data. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US data residency. Competitive strategy and customer feedback confidentiality.

security_score_components.security_notes: Product roadmap data. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US data residency. Strategy confidentiality and customer idea PII.
